title: campaign-greenlight input spec
description:
Inputs to ``campaign-greenlight`` (start).

A pure read on the first pass (digest the spec → ``needs_greenlight``). On
the re-invocation the caller makes AFTER the human answered ``y``, set
``confirm=True`` — the block stamps ``mark_greenlit`` onto the manifest and
journals the decision (``response`` / ``proposal``). The verb never decides
on its own: it digests, or records a caller-supplied greenlight.

campaign_id.description: The campaign whose manifest (the greenlit-once spec) to digest.
campaign_id.title: Campaign Id

confirm.description: Set on the post-`y` re-invocation to RECORD the human's greenlight: stamp mark_greenlit onto the manifest + journal the decision. Left False, the block only DIGESTS the spec (nothing is stamped).
confirm.title: Confirm

response.description: The human's answer to journal when confirm is set ('y' for a plain greenlight, or the nudge text that shaped the final spec). Ignored when confirm is False.
response.title: Response

proposal.description: The LLM's drafted proposal over the spec brief, journaled verbatim alongside the response when confirm is set. Optional.
proposal.title: Proposal

journal.description: When confirm is set, also append the greenlight to the campaign decision journal. Disable only to stamp the marker without a decision record (e.g. a re-stamp).
journal.title: Journal
